title: King of Pain
meaning_summary: King of Pain strengthens Synchronicity's album value because it gives the record another recognizable catalog anchor beyond Every Breath You Take.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate is modeled from classic-rock catalog replay and The Police's long-tail single demand.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not modeled as a fully sold song position
ownership.notes: Artist-side range is directional and not based on disclosed royalty statements.
